version.description: The version of the telemetry configuration

telemetry_url.description: The endpoint URL for the payu telemetry service

telemetry_proxy_url.description: The proxy URL for the payu telemetry service

telemetry_token.description: The authentication token for the payu telemetry service

telemetry_service_name.description: The name of the service sending telemetry data

hostname.description: The name of the HPC host where payu is running
